phrases.intent_en: Ask where the monumental fountain is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Fonte Monumental exatamente?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH FOHNG-tih moo-noo-mayng-TAHL eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Locals use the fountain as a primary meeting point and landmark.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no centro da praça.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO SAYNGT-roo DUH PRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is in the center of the square.

phrases.cultural_note: The Fonte Monumental is a central landmark in the garden, often used as a meeting point.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua do Souto starts
phrases.text_local: Onde começa a Rua do Souto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AH ROOUH DOO SOHW-too?
phrases.cultural_note: This pedestrian street connects the square directly to the historic shopping district.

likely_response.local: Começa no Jardim da Praça da República.
